name: AIFundamentals Codespace
postCreateCommand: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt jupyterlab notebook ipykernel && python -m ipykernel install --user --name training-env --display-name training-env && python -m ipykernel install --user --name det-env --display-name det-env
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'pgrep -f "mlflow ui --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8885" >/dev/null || nohup python -m mlflow ui --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8885 --backend-store-uri sqlite:///mlruns.db >/tmp/mlflow.log 2>&1 &'
postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'pgrep -f "mlflow ui --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8885" >/dev/null || nohup python -m mlflow ui --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8885 --backend-store-uri sqlite:///mlruns.db >/tmp/mlflow.log 2>&1 &'
